must.text: Production main-agent-mental-model-gate computes and records all six model results.
must.textZh: 生产级 main-agent-mental-model-gate 必须计算并记录全部六个心智模型结果。

must.text: Canonical model result events include model, hashes, source refs, status, blockers, and before/after record hashes.
must.textZh: 标准模型结果事件必须包含模型、哈希、来源引用、状态、阻断项以及记录写入前后的哈希。

must.text: Controlled forward transition writer rejects non-current fromModel, non-adjacent toModel, blocked results, stale evidence, open reconfirmation, open rerun, pending blockers, and hash mismatch.
must.textZh: 受控前进迁移写入器必须拒绝非当前 fromModel、非相邻 toModel、已阻断结果、陈旧证据、未关闭再确认、未关闭 rerun、待处理 blocker 和哈希不匹配。

must.text: Controlled rollback writer permits rollback only for blocking reconfirmation or controlled blockers, records hashes, and targets requirement or architecture confirmation only.
must.textZh: 受控回滚写入器只允许因阻断性再确认或受控 blocker 回滚，必须记录哈希，并且只能回滚到需求确认或架构确认。

must.text: Controlled reconfirmation router classifies semantic drift and writes reconfirmation_requested before any rollback.
must.textZh: 受控再确认路由器必须分类语义漂移，并在任何回滚前写入 reconfirmation_requested。

must.text: Reconfirmation request payload has target model, blocking status, closure condition, hashes, source refs, and record hashes without directly writing currentMentalModel or transitions.
must.textZh: 再确认请求 payload 必须包含目标模型、阻断状态、关闭条件、哈希、来源引用和记录哈希，并且不得直接写入 currentMentalModel 或 transitions。

must.text: Controlled reconfirmation ingest closes requests only when exact phrase and current source, implementation, and confirmation page hashes match.
must.textZh: 受控再确认 ingest 只能在精确确认短语以及当前 source、implementation 和确认页哈希全部匹配时关闭请求。

must.text: Production blocker intake normalizes raw blocker signals and blocks downstream progression while any blocker is pending, stale, unknown, blocked, or unresolved.
must.textZh: 生产级 blocker intake 必须规范化原始阻断信号，并在任何 blocker 处于 pending、stale、unknown、blocked 或 unresolved 时阻断下游推进。

must.text: Main Agent inspect displays active record, current mental model, model result, six-model summary, blockers, reconfirmation, rerun, attempt binding, next safe action, and forbidden shortcuts.
must.textZh: Main Agent inspect 必须显示活动记录、当前心智模型、模型结果、六模型摘要、blocker、再确认、rerun、attempt 绑定、下一安全动作和禁止的捷径。

must.text: Production run-loop calls inspect, blocker intake, and mental model gate before progression and dispatch decisions.
must.textZh: 生产 run-loop 必须在推进和 dispatch 决策前调用 inspect、blocker intake 和 mental model gate。

must.text: Rerun loops are owner-model scoped, hash-bound, evidence-bound, and never imply model pass without recomputation.
must.textZh: Rerun loop 必须限定 owner model、绑定哈希和证据，并且不得在未重新计算时暗示模型已通过。

must.text: execution_closure_result_recorded summarizes dispatch packet, model packet, human prompt, strategy, TaskReport, envelope, commands, trace rows, artifacts, SDD manifest, failures, reruns, attempt binding, and controlled evidence ingest.
must.textZh: execution_closure_result_recorded 必须汇总 dispatch packet、model packet、human prompt、策略、TaskReport、envelope、命令、trace rows、工件、SDD manifest、失败、rerun、attempt 绑定和受控证据 ingest。

must.text: audit_review_result_recorded summarizes audit reports, scores, scoring dimensions, reviewer closeout, reverse audit, findings, waivers, reruns, blocker intake, and attempt binding.
must.textZh: audit_review_result_recorded 必须汇总审计报告、评分、评分维度、reviewer closeout、反向审计、发现项、waiver、rerun、blocker intake 和 attempt 绑定。

must.text: delivery_confirmation_result_recorded precedes record_closed, and record_closed requires delivery confirmation pass, execution closure pass, audit review pass, no blockers, no reconfirmation, no unresolved rerun, current command evidence, AI-TDD closeout proof, delivery truth gate pass, and record hash match.
must.textZh: delivery_confirmation_result_recorded 必须先于 record_closed；record_closed 必须要求 delivery confirmation、execution closure、audit review 全部通过，无 blocker、无再确认、无未解决 rerun，具备当前命令证据、AI-TDD closeout 证明、delivery truth gate 通过以及记录哈希匹配。

must.text: Legacy events cannot be target-state progression authority and MUST remain only as migration, diagnostics, gate/stage/report names, or negative compatibility fixtures.
must.textZh: legacy event 不能作为目标态推进权威，只能作为迁移、诊断、gate/stage/report 名称或负向兼容 fixture 保留。

must.text: RequirementRecord schema enforces production contracts for model results, transitions, reconfirmation, rerun, blocker intake, BMAD association, external board evidence, sprint status authorization, and terminal close.
must.textZh: RequirementRecord schema 必须强制模型结果、迁移、再确认、rerun、blocker intake、BMAD 关联、外部看板证据、sprint 状态授权和终态关闭的生产契约。

must.text: Writer registry owns every canonical control event and unowned writers fail closed when writing control fields.
must.textZh: writer registry 必须拥有每个标准控制事件；未拥有事件的 writer 写控制字段时必须 fail closed。

must.text: Production E2E matrix covers happy path, model fail-closed paths, invalid transition ordering, reconfirmation, rerun recovery, stale results, blocker intake, pre-close blocking, post-close defect isolation, legacy denial, and external board evidence-only boundaries.
must.textZh: 生产 E2E 矩阵必须覆盖 happy path、模型 fail-closed 路径、非法迁移顺序、再确认、rerun 恢复、陈旧结果、blocker intake、关闭前阻断、关闭后缺陷隔离、legacy denial 和外部看板仅证据边界。

must.text: Codex, Cursor, Claude, _bmad, and generated host surfaces expose the same six-model vocabulary and never list delivery_closeout as a mental model.
must.textZh: Codex、Cursor、Claude、_bmad 和生成的 host surface 必须暴露同一组六模型词汇，并且不得把 delivery_closeout 列为心智模型。

must.text: Requirements docs, renderer specs, confirmation HTML, help surfaces, and skill docs state the same authority model and renderer output stays read-only.
must.textZh: 需求文档、renderer spec、确认 HTML、help surface 和 skill 文档必须声明同一权威模型，并且 renderer 输出必须保持只读。

must.text: MUST-to-command semantic coverage gate decomposes every MUST into atoms and blocks weak-only, orphaned, stage-mismatched, missing-command, missing-oracle, or missing-scoring-dimension coverage.
must.textZh: MUST-to-command 语义覆盖门禁必须把每个 MUST 拆成语义原子，并阻断弱覆盖、孤儿覆盖、阶段错配、缺命令、缺 oracle 或缺评分维度的情况。

must.text: req-trace compiler and ContractExecutionManifest emit semantic coverage sections and fail closed when coverage is incomplete or stale.
must.textZh: req-trace compiler 和 ContractExecutionManifest 必须输出语义覆盖章节，并在覆盖不完整或陈旧时 fail closed。

must.text: audit_review dispatch requires AuditExecutionProfile, auditScoringConvergencePolicy, reviewer profile hash, required scoring dimensions, runAuditorHost arguments, and current-attempt binding.
must.textZh: audit_review dispatch 必须要求 AuditExecutionProfile、auditScoringConvergencePolicy、reviewer profile hash、必需评分维度、runAuditorHost 参数和当前 attempt 绑定。

must.text: audit_review_result_recorded.status=pass requires parseable scoring block, scoring records, score receipt, runAuditorHost receipt, and three consecutive valid no-new-gap rounds.
must.textZh: audit_review_result_recorded.status=pass 必须要求可解析评分块、评分记录、score receipt、runAuditorHost receipt 和连续三轮有效 no-new-gap。

must.text: Main Agent inspect, dispatch-plan, and run-loop consume one six mental model decision matrix that maps current model, model status, blockers, reruns, reconfirmation, pending packets, and current-attempt evidence to nextAction.
must.textZh: Main Agent inspect、dispatch-plan 和 run-loop 必须消费同一个六心智模型决策矩阵，将当前模型、模型状态、blocker、rerun、再确认、pending packet 和当前 attempt 证据映射到 nextAction。

must.text: The system defines and consumes a shared stage-aware CriticalAuditorProfile that binds compiler, readiness, audit_review, scoring, convergence, and delivery closeout to stage-specific dimensions, fixed perspectives, required check items, hashes, and fail-closed receipts.
must.textZh: 系统必须定义并消费共享的阶段感知 CriticalAuditorProfile，将 compiler、readiness、audit_review、scoring、convergence 和 delivery closeout 绑定到阶段化评分维度、固定审计视角、必需检查项、hash 和 fail-closed receipt。

must.text: Main Agent dispatch selects a deterministic host runtime mode: Codex and Claude Code CLI must activate native /goal, Cursor IDE must use a Ralph Method TDD subagent loop, and Cursor CLI or unknown hosts must use main-session direct execution.
must.textZh: Main Agent dispatch 必须选择确定性的 host runtime mode：Codex 和 Claude Code CLI 必须真实激活 /goal，Cursor IDE 必须使用 Ralph Method TDD 子代理循环，Cursor CLI 或未知 host 必须使用主会话直接执行。

must.text: Any audit used as a gate, no-gap claim, convergence claim, docs-review claim, grill-with-docs claim, scoring claim, CriticalAuditorProfile claim, or runAuditorHost claim must run through audit triad closed-loop orchestration with three independent subagents, fixed perspectives, main-agent repair receipts, repair feedback, and three consecutive all-perspective no-valid-gap rounds.
must.textZh: 任何用于 gate、no-gap、收敛、docs-review、grill-with-docs、评分、CriticalAuditorProfile 或 runAuditorHost 声明的 audit，都必须通过三子代理审计闭环编排执行，包含三个独立子代理、固定视角、主 Agent 修复回执、修复反馈和连续三轮全视角无有效 gap。

notDone.text: Helper-only transition tests cannot prove production run-loop behavior.
notDone.textZh: 仅 helper 层迁移测试不能证明生产 run-loop 行为。

notDone.whyItBlocksCompletionZh: 仅 helper 层证明可能绕过生产 writer 和 run-loop 权威。

notDone.whyItBlocksCompletion: Semantic drift changes confirmed scope or binding.
notDone.whyItBlocksCompletionZh: 语义漂移会改变已确认范围或绑定。

notDone.whyItBlocksCompletion: Evidence surfaces are not progression authority.
notDone.whyItBlocksCompletionZh: 证据 surface 不是推进权威。

notDone.whyItBlocksCompletionZh: 终态生命周期关闭不能绕过 delivery confirmation。

notDone.whyItBlocksCompletion: Legacy replay can reintroduce conflicting target states.
notDone.whyItBlocksCompletionZh: legacy replay 可能重新引入冲突的目标状态。

notDone.text: Post-close defect carriers cannot mutate the closed origin record control fields.
notDone.textZh: 关闭后缺陷载体不能修改已关闭源记录的控制字段。
notDone.whyItBlocksCompletion: Closed origin records must remain immutable control facts.
notDone.whyItBlocksCompletionZh: 已关闭源记录必须保持为不可变控制事实。

notDone.text: Broad coverage cannot satisfy semantic atoms that require command oracle, scoring, or current-attempt evidence.
notDone.textZh: 宽泛覆盖不能满足需要命令 oracle、评分或当前尝试证据的语义原子。
notDone.whyItBlocksCompletion: Broad coverage can hide missing MUST-level executable proof.
notDone.whyItBlocksCompletionZh: 宽泛覆盖会隐藏 MUST 级可执行证明缺口。

notDone.whyItBlocksCompletion: Self-review bypasses independent audit review.
notDone.whyItBlocksCompletionZh: 自审会绕过独立审计复核。

notDone.textZh: TaskReport、worker exit code、prompt completion 或 SubagentEvidenceEnvelope 不能推进 execution closure、audit、closeout 或 record close。
notDone.whyItBlocksCompletion: Execution iteration evidence is not model result authority.
notDone.whyItBlocksCompletionZh: 执行迭代证据不是模型结果权威。

notDone.textZh: orchestration-state nextAction 不能覆盖六心智模型决策矩阵。
notDone.whyItBlocksCompletion: Split-brain nextAction can skip required model gates.

notDone.whyItBlocksCompletionZh: prompt-only goal 可能绕过 host runtime goal 强制执行。

notDone.textZh: Cursor IDE implementation dispatch 不能使用主会话直接执行。
notDone.whyItBlocksCompletion: Cursor IDE requires Ralph Method TDD subagent tracking artifacts.
notDone.whyItBlocksCompletionZh: Cursor IDE 需要 Ralph Method TDD 子代理追踪产物。

notDone.text: heartbeat_timeout_ms cannot be treated as task completion failure or await_user by itself.
notDone.textZh: heartbeat_timeout_ms 不能单独被当作任务完成失败或 await_user。
notDone.whyItBlocksCompletion: Heartbeat timeout is stale-contact detection only.
notDone.whyItBlocksCompletionZh: heartbeat timeout 仅用于失联检测。

notDone.text: A single audit report cannot satisfy audit pass, no-gap, or convergence.
notDone.textZh: 单一 audit report 不能满足 audit pass、no-gap 或 convergence。
notDone.whyItBlocksCompletion: Single-agent audit bypasses the required triad perspectives.
notDone.whyItBlocksCompletionZh: 单代理审计会绕过必需的三视角审计。

notDone.text: Two or more audit reports from the same agentId, same executor, or same perspective cannot satisfy triad audit.
notDone.textZh: 来自同一 agentId、同一 executor 或同一 perspective 的两个或更多 audit report 不能满足 triad audit。
notDone.whyItBlocksCompletion: Duplicate subagents or perspectives create false audit diversity.
notDone.whyItBlocksCompletionZh: 重复子代理或视角会制造虚假的审计多样性。

notDone.text: A subagent audit report that modified source files, runtime control state, or generated surfaces cannot receive no-gap credit.
notDone.textZh: 修改了源文件、runtime control state 或生成 surface 的子代理 audit report 不能获得 no-gap credit。
notDone.whyItBlocksCompletion: Subagents are audit-only and cannot repair their own findings.
notDone.whyItBlocksCompletionZh: 子代理只能审计，不能修复自己的发现。

notDone.text: A repair that was not written by the main agent cannot close a valid audit gap.
notDone.textZh: 不是由主 Agent 写入的修复不能关闭有效 audit gap。
notDone.whyItBlocksCompletion: Repair ownership must remain with the main agent.
notDone.whyItBlocksCompletionZh: 修复所有权必须保留在主 Agent。

notDone.text: A valid audit gap cannot close until the main-agent repair receipt is sent back to all three subagents and all three subagents re-audit it.
notDone.textZh: 有效 audit gap 在主 Agent 修复回执发送给三个子代理并由三个子代理复审前不能关闭。
notDone.whyItBlocksCompletion: Repair without feedback review can create self-consistent closure.
notDone.whyItBlocksCompletionZh: 没有反馈复审的修复会产生快速自洽闭合。

notDone.text: A stale triad convergence receipt cannot satisfy compiler, readiness, audit review, delivery confirmation, rerun, reconfirmation, docs-review, or grill-with-docs closure.
notDone.textZh: 陈旧 triad convergence receipt 不能满足 compiler、readiness、audit review、delivery confirmation、rerun、reconfirmation、docs-review 或 grill-with-docs closure。
notDone.whyItBlocksCompletion: Triad convergence must reset on every relevant hash or contract change.
notDone.whyItBlocksCompletionZh: triad convergence 必须在相关 hash 或契约变化时重置。

mustNot.text: Do not add a seventh mental model or a separate orchestration authority.
mustNot.textZh: 不得新增第七个心智模型或独立编排权威。

mustNot.text: Do not treat compiled prompt dispatch, TaskReport, or SubagentEvidenceEnvelope as six-model completion proof.
mustNot.textZh: 不得把 compiled prompt dispatch、TaskReport 或 SubagentEvidenceEnvelope 当作六模型完成证明。
mustNot.scopeBoundaryZh: 执行证据不是模型结果权威

mustNot.text: Do not let dashboards, scores, SFT output, reports, hooks, or external boards mutate RequirementRecord control fields.
mustNot.textZh: 不得允许 dashboard、score、SFT 输出、report、hook 或 external board 修改 RequirementRecord 控制字段。
mustNot.scopeBoundaryZh: read model 和外部 receipt 仅作为证据

mustNot.text: Do not treat upstream BMAD planning workflow reports as six-model implementation_readiness PASS.
mustNot.textZh: 不得把 upstream BMAD planning workflow 报告当作六模型 implementation_readiness PASS。
mustNot.scopeBoundaryZh: upstream planning workflow 仅为兼容 surface

mustNot.text: Do not reopen or mutate a closed origin record for post-close defects.
mustNot.textZh: 不得为了关闭后缺陷重新打开或修改已关闭源记录。
mustNot.scopeBoundaryZh: 关闭后缺陷必须使用关联载体

mustNot.text: Do not silently migrate or replay legacy events as canonical target-state events.
mustNot.textZh: 不得静默迁移或 replay legacy event 作为标准目标态事件。
mustNot.scopeBoundaryZh: legacy event 需要显式 upcaster 或负向 fixture

evidence.text: Production mental model gate evidence proves all six results are computed and recorded.
evidence.textZh: 生产心智模型 gate 证据必须证明全部六个结果已被计算并记录。
evidence.oracle: Test assertions inspect production command or API output, model statuses, source refs, hashes, and fail-closed missing-input cases.
evidence.oracleZh: 测试断言必须检查生产命令或 API 输出、模型状态、来源引用、哈希以及缺失输入 fail-closed 场景。

evidence.text: Transition writer evidence proves adjacent transition pass and invalid transition fail-closed cases.
evidence.textZh: 迁移写入器证据必须证明相邻迁移通过以及非法迁移 fail-closed 场景。
evidence.oracle: Tests prove non-adjacent transition, fromModel mismatch, blocked current result, open reconfirmation, open rerun, pending blocker, stale evidence, and hash mismatch leave the record unchanged.
evidence.oracleZh: 测试必须证明非相邻迁移、fromModel 不匹配、当前结果被阻断、未关闭再确认、未关闭 rerun、待处理 blocker、陈旧证据和哈希不匹配都会保持记录不变。

evidence.text: Reconfirmation router evidence proves semantic drift routes to blocking reconfirmation and controlled rollback.
evidence.textZh: 再确认路由器证据必须证明语义漂移会路由到阻断性再确认和受控回滚。
evidence.oracle: Tests cover source, implementation confirmation, architecture, scope, trace, evidence, command, current target, and manifest drift.
evidence.oracleZh: 测试必须覆盖 source、implementation confirmation、architecture、scope、trace、evidence、command、current target 和 manifest drift。

evidence.text: Rerun loop evidence proves open rerun blocks and resolved rerun does not imply pass.
evidence.textZh: Rerun loop 证据必须证明未关闭 rerun 会阻断，并且 resolved rerun 不代表通过。
evidence.oracle: Tests recompute the owner model result after rerun resolution and block when the recomputed result remains blocked or stale.
evidence.oracleZh: 测试必须在 rerun resolution 后重新计算 owner model 结果，并在重新计算结果仍为 blocked 或 stale 时继续阻断。

evidence.text: Production run-loop evidence proves the record closes only through all six model results and current delivery proof.
evidence.textZh: 生产 run-loop 证据必须证明记录只能通过全部六个模型结果和当前 delivery proof 关闭。
evidence.oracle: E2E starts from RequirementRecord, progresses through six model results, blocks shortcuts, and writes record_closed only after delivery confirmation pass.
evidence.oracleZh: E2E 必须从 RequirementRecord 开始，经过六个模型结果，阻断捷径，并且只在 delivery confirmation 通过后写入 record_closed。

evidence.text: Legacy cleanup evidence proves legacy events and gate_check_recorded cannot drive target-state progression.
evidence.textZh: Legacy cleanup 证据必须证明 legacy event 和 gate_check_recorded 不能驱动目标态推进。
evidence.gate: rg legacy event and shortcut patterns across scripts, tests, and host surfaces
evidence.oracle: Search gates and negative tests classify every legacy match as migration, diagnostic, gate/stage/report name, or negative fixture.
evidence.oracleZh: 搜索 gate 和负向测试必须把每个 legacy 命中分类为迁移、诊断、gate/stage/report 名称或负向 fixture。

evidence.text: Renderer and host surface evidence proves canonical six-model vocabulary and read-only rendering.
evidence.textZh: Renderer 和 host surface 证据必须证明标准六模型词汇和只读渲染。
evidence.oracle: Surface checks prove no host surface lists delivery_closeout as a mental model and renderer only projects RequirementRecord state.
evidence.oracleZh: surface 检查必须证明没有 host surface 把 delivery_closeout 列为心智模型，并且 renderer 只投影 RequirementRecord 状态。

evidence.text: Semantic coverage evidence proves every MUST atom has strong command-backed coverage.
evidence.textZh: 语义覆盖证据必须证明每个 MUST 原子都有强命令覆盖。
evidence.oracle: Tests reject weak-only, orphaned, stage-mismatched, missing-command, missing-oracle, and missing-scoring-dimension MUST atoms before compiler output, implementation readiness pass, audit pass, or delivery close.
evidence.oracleZh: 测试必须在 compiler 输出、implementation readiness pass、audit pass 或 delivery close 前拒绝弱覆盖、孤儿覆盖、阶段错配、缺命令、缺 oracle 和缺评分维度的 MUST 原子。

evidence.text: Audit review profile evidence proves audit dispatch uses a first-class AuditExecutionProfile.
evidence.textZh: 审计复核 profile 证据必须证明 audit dispatch 使用一等 AuditExecutionProfile。
evidence.oracle: Tests reject legacy_generic_prompt, null compiledPromptRef, self-review, missing reviewer profile hash, missing runAuditorHost args, and missing current-attempt binding.
evidence.oracleZh: 测试必须拒绝 legacy_generic_prompt、空 compiledPromptRef、自审、缺 reviewer profile hash、缺 runAuditorHost 参数和缺 current-attempt binding。

evidence.text: Audit scoring convergence evidence proves audit review cannot pass without current scoring convergence.
evidence.textZh: 审计评分收敛证据必须证明 audit review 不能在缺少当前评分收敛时通过。
evidence.gate: npx vitest run tests/acceptance/main-agent-audit-review-fail-closed.test.ts and npx vitest run tests/acceptance/main-agent-audit-review-convergence.test.ts
evidence.oracle: Tests reject audit pass when parseable scoring block, score receipt, required scoring dimensions, runAuditorHost receipt, three current no-gap rounds, or unresolved finding closure is missing.
evidence.oracleZh: 测试必须在缺少可解析评分块、score receipt、必需评分维度、runAuditorHost receipt、三轮当前无 gap 或未关闭 finding 时拒绝 audit pass。

evidence.text: State machine decision matrix evidence proves inspect, dispatch-plan, and run-loop consume one matrix.
evidence.textZh: 状态机决策矩阵证据必须证明 inspect、dispatch-plan 和 run-loop 使用同一个矩阵。
evidence.oracle: Tests reject non-adjacent nextAction, stale orchestration-state nextAction, reviewer prose closeout, dashboard green closeout, score green closeout, and TaskReport-driven audit dispatch.
evidence.oracleZh: 测试必须拒绝非相邻 nextAction、陈旧 orchestration-state nextAction、reviewer prose closeout、dashboard green closeout、score green closeout 和 TaskReport 驱动的 audit dispatch。

evidence.text: Critical auditor shared profile evidence proves stage-aware profile, fixed perspectives, and hash-bound convergence.
evidence.textZh: Critical auditor 共享 profile 证据必须证明阶段感知 profile、固定视角和哈希绑定收敛。
evidence.gate: npx vitest run tests/acceptance/critical-auditor-profile-contract.test.ts and npx vitest run tests/acceptance/main-agent-critical-auditor-profile-consumption.test.ts
evidence.oracle: Tests reject generic stage profiles, missing dimension contracts, missing check items, missing fixed perspectives, stale profile hashes, stale check item hashes, and stale convergence receipts.
evidence.oracleZh: 测试必须拒绝泛化阶段 profile、缺 dimension contract、缺 check item、缺固定视角、陈旧 profile hash、陈旧 check item hash 和陈旧 convergence receipt。

evidence.text: Host runtime mode and supervised execution evidence proves native goal invocation and heartbeat-only timeout semantics.
evidence.textZh: Host runtime mode 和受监督执行证据必须证明 native goal 真实调用和 heartbeat-only timeout 语义。
evidence.gate: npx vitest run tests/acceptance/main-agent-host-runtime-mode.test.ts and npx vitest run tests/acceptance/main-agent-supervised-worker-timeout.test.ts
evidence.oracle: Tests reject prompt-only goal, Cursor IDE direct execution, unknown-host blocking, heartbeat_timeout_ms as completion timeout, TaskProgress completion, and TaskReport bypassing execution closure.
evidence.oracleZh: 测试必须拒绝 prompt-only goal、Cursor IDE 直接执行、unknown-host 阻断、把 heartbeat_timeout_ms 当完成超时、TaskProgress 完成和 TaskReport 绕过 execution closure。

evidence.text: Audit triad closed-loop evidence proves every gate-level audit uses three independent subagents, fixed perspectives, main-agent repair receipts, repair feedback, and three consecutive all-perspective no-valid-gap rounds.
evidence.textZh: Audit triad 闭环证据必须证明每个 gate 级 audit 都使用三个独立子代理、固定视角、主 Agent 修复回执、修复反馈和连续三轮全视角无有效 gap。
evidence.gate: npx vitest run tests/acceptance/audit-triad-orchestration-policy.test.ts and npx vitest run tests/acceptance/audit-triad-closed-loop-e2e.test.ts and npx vitest run tests/acceptance/audit-triad-reset-on-reconfirm.test.ts and npx vitest run tests/acceptance/docs-triad-review-policy.test.ts
evidence.oracle: Tests reject missing AuditTriadExecutionPlan, duplicate agentId, duplicate perspective, subagent source writes, missing main-agent repair receipt, missing repair feedback dispatch, fewer than three all-perspective no-gap rounds, and stale convergence receipts after source, confirmation, packet, profile, check item, attempt, or evidence hash changes.
evidence.oracleZh: 测试必须拒绝缺失 AuditTriadExecutionPlan、重复 agentId、重复 perspective、子代理写源文件、缺主 Agent 修复回执、缺修复反馈派发、少于三轮全视角无 gap，以及 source、confirmation、packet、profile、check item、attempt 或 evidence hash 变化后的陈旧收敛回执。

failurePaths.trigger: Production behavior is claimed from helper-only transition tests.
failurePaths.triggerZh: 使用仅 helper 层迁移测试声称生产行为已证明。
failurePaths.expectedBehavior: Fail closeout and require production script or production API evidence.
failurePaths.expectedBehaviorZh: 必须让 closeout 失败，并要求生产脚本或生产 API 证据。

failurePaths.trigger: Transition skips a model or fromModel differs from record.currentMentalModel.
failurePaths.triggerZh: 迁移跳过模型，或 fromModel 与 record.currentMentalModel 不一致。
failurePaths.expectedBehavior: Throw a deterministic transition error and leave the RequirementRecord unchanged.
failurePaths.expectedBehaviorZh: 必须抛出确定性的迁移错误，并保持 RequirementRecord 不变。

failurePaths.triggerZh: 存在未关闭的阻断性再确认请求。
failurePaths.expectedBehavior: Block transition, dispatch, audit pass, delivery pass, and record close.
failurePaths.expectedBehaviorZh: 必须阻断迁移、dispatch、audit pass、delivery pass 和记录关闭。

failurePaths.trigger: Rerun loop is resolved but the owning model result remains blocked or stale.
failurePaths.triggerZh: Rerun loop 已 resolved，但所属模型结果仍为 blocked 或 stale。
failurePaths.expectedBehavior: Keep the model blocked until production model result writer records pass.
failurePaths.expectedBehaviorZh: 必须保持模型阻断，直到生产模型结果写入器记录 pass。

failurePaths.trigger: record_closed is attempted before delivery confirmation pass.
failurePaths.triggerZh: 在 delivery confirmation pass 前尝试写入 record_closed。
failurePaths.expectedBehavior: Reject closeout shortcut and leave terminal lifecycle state unchanged.
failurePaths.expectedBehaviorZh: 必须拒绝 closeout 捷径，并保持终态生命周期状态不变。

failurePaths.trigger: Legacy event, gate_check_recorded, dashboard, score, external board, report, or hook tries to write a target control field.
failurePaths.triggerZh: legacy event、gate_check_recorded、dashboard、score、external board、report 或 hook 尝试写入目标控制字段。
failurePaths.expectedBehavior: Treat the source as evidence or diagnostic only, or require explicit target-state upcaster coverage.
failurePaths.expectedBehaviorZh: 必须仅把来源作为证据或诊断处理，或要求显式目标态 upcaster 覆盖。

failurePaths.trigger: Post-close defect carrier attempts to mutate origin status, currentMentalModel, sixModelResults, closeout, or record_closed proof.
failurePaths.triggerZh: 关闭后缺陷载体尝试修改源记录 status、currentMentalModel、sixModelResults、closeout 或 record_closed 证明。
failurePaths.expectedBehavior: Reject the mutation and create or link a bugfix/new requirement carrier.
failurePaths.expectedBehaviorZh: 必须拒绝该修改，并创建或关联 bugfix 或新需求载体。

failurePaths.trigger: MUST atom has weak-only, orphaned, stage-mismatched, missing-command, missing-oracle, or missing-scoring-dimension coverage.
failurePaths.triggerZh: MUST 原子只有弱覆盖、孤儿覆盖、阶段错配、缺命令、缺 oracle 或缺评分维度。
failurePaths.expectedBehavior: Block compiler output, implementation readiness pass, audit review pass, and delivery close.
failurePaths.expectedBehaviorZh: 必须阻断 compiler 输出、implementation readiness pass、audit review pass 和 delivery close。

failurePaths.trigger: Audit review lacks profile, scoring, runAuditorHost receipt, convergence receipt, or current-attempt binding.
failurePaths.triggerZh: Audit review 缺少 profile、评分、runAuditorHost receipt、convergence receipt 或 current-attempt binding。
failurePaths.expectedBehavior: Block audit_review_result_recorded.status=pass and block delivery confirmation.
failurePaths.expectedBehaviorZh: 必须阻断 audit_review_result_recorded.status=pass 和 delivery confirmation。

failurePaths.trigger: Inspect, dispatch-plan, or run-loop derives a nextAction outside the six-model decision matrix.
failurePaths.triggerZh: Inspect、dispatch-plan 或 run-loop 从六模型决策矩阵外推导 nextAction。
failurePaths.expectedBehavior: Record split_brain_orchestration_state_next_action or matrix violation and block dispatch.
failurePaths.expectedBehaviorZh: 必须记录 split_brain_orchestration_state_next_action 或矩阵违规并阻断 dispatch。

failurePaths.trigger: Gate-level audit is represented by one audit report or one reviewer perspective.
failurePaths.triggerZh: gate 级审计只由一个 audit report 或一个 reviewer 视角表示。
failurePaths.expectedBehavior: Block audit pass, no-gap, convergence, docs-review, grill-with-docs, scoring, and closeout claims.
failurePaths.expectedBehaviorZh: 必须阻断 audit pass、no-gap、convergence、docs-review、grill-with-docs、scoring 和 closeout 声明。

failurePaths.trigger: Audit triad contains duplicate agentId or duplicate executor identity.
failurePaths.triggerZh: audit triad 中存在重复 agentId 或重复 executor 身份。
failurePaths.expectedBehavior: Reject the triad plan and require three independent subagent identities before audit execution.
failurePaths.expectedBehaviorZh: 必须拒绝 triad plan，并要求在审计执行前具备三个独立子代理身份。

failurePaths.trigger: Audit triad contains duplicate perspective or missing required perspective coverage.
failurePaths.triggerZh: audit triad 中存在重复 perspective 或缺失必需 perspective 覆盖。
failurePaths.expectedBehavior: Reject convergence and require product, model-parsing, and main-agent-execution perspectives.
failurePaths.expectedBehaviorZh: 必须拒绝 convergence，并要求产品、模型解析和主 Agent 执行三个视角。

failurePaths.trigger: Subagent audit modifies source files, runtime control state, generated surfaces, or repair artifacts.
failurePaths.triggerZh: 子代理审计修改源文件、runtime control state、生成 surface 或修复产物。
failurePaths.expectedBehavior: Invalidate that subagent report for no-gap credit and require main-agent-owned repair.
failurePaths.expectedBehaviorZh: 必须使该子代理报告失去 no-gap credit，并要求主 Agent 拥有修复。

failurePaths.trigger: Valid audit gap is closed without main-agent repair receipt and repair feedback dispatch to all subagents.
failurePaths.triggerZh: 有效 audit gap 在没有主 Agent 修复回执和向所有子代理派发修复反馈的情况下被关闭。
failurePaths.expectedBehavior: Keep the gap open, reset no-gap count, and continue the audit triad loop.
failurePaths.expectedBehaviorZh: 必须保持 gap 未关闭、重置 no-gap 计数，并继续 audit triad 闭环。

failurePaths.trigger: Source, confirmation, packet, profile, check item, attempt, or evidence hash changes after triad convergence.
failurePaths.triggerZh: source、confirmation、packet、profile、check item、attempt 或 evidence hash 在 triad convergence 后发生变化。
failurePaths.expectedBehavior: Mark the convergence receipt stale, archive stale audit artifacts, and restart from triad round one.
failurePaths.expectedBehaviorZh: 必须将 convergence receipt 标为 stale、归档陈旧审计产物，并从 triad 第一轮重新开始。

failurePaths.trigger: Compiler, readiness, audit review, delivery confirmation, reconfirmation, or docs-review consumes a stale triad receipt.
failurePaths.triggerZh: compiler、readiness、audit review、delivery confirmation、reconfirmation 或 docs-review 消费陈旧 triad receipt。
failurePaths.expectedBehavior: Fail closed and require a current audit-triad-convergence-receipt bound to the current hashes.
failurePaths.expectedBehaviorZh: 必须 fail closed，并要求绑定当前 hashes 的最新 audit-triad-convergence-receipt。

edgeCases.expectedBehaviorZh: 必须以 stale 专属原因阻断推进。

edgeCases.condition: Duplicate result event has different hashes.
edgeCases.conditionZh: 重复结果事件携带不同哈希。
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Fail closed instead of accepting non-idempotent replay.
edgeCases.expectedBehaviorZh: 必须 fail closed，而不是接受非幂等 replay。

edgeCases.condition: Reconfirmation request and rerun loop are both open.
edgeCases.conditionZh: 再确认请求和 rerun loop 同时未关闭。
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Reconfirmation authority wins and rerun cannot advance the model.
edgeCases.expectedBehaviorZh: 必须以再确认权威优先，rerun 不能推进模型。

edgeCases.condition: External board done signal arrives before BMAD delivery confirmation.
edgeCases.conditionZh: 外部看板 done 信号早于 BMAD delivery confirmation 到达。
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Store the signal as evidence or patch-back receipt only.
edgeCases.expectedBehaviorZh: 必须仅把该信号保存为证据或 patch-back receipt。

edgeCases.condition: Story adoption changes scope, acceptance, trace rows, evidence, architecture, or interface.
edgeCases.conditionZh: story adoption 改变范围、验收、trace rows、证据、架构或接口。
edgeCases.expectedBehaviorZh: 必须在下游实施前触发再确认。

edgeCases.condition: Defect is discovered after origin record is closed.
edgeCases.conditionZh: 源记录关闭后发现缺陷。
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Create or link a bugfix/new requirement carrier and do not reopen the origin record.
edgeCases.expectedBehaviorZh: 必须创建或关联 bugfix 或新需求载体，并且不得重新打开源记录。

edgeCases.condition: Broad E2E reaches record_closed without proving semantic atom, scoring, runAuditorHost, or convergence details.
edgeCases.conditionZh: 宽泛 E2E 到达 record_closed，但没有证明语义原子、评分、runAuditorHost 或收敛细节。
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Treat the E2E as insufficient for those atoms and require dedicated command oracle evidence.
edgeCases.expectedBehaviorZh: 必须把该 E2E 视为不足以证明这些原子，并要求专门的命令 oracle 证据。

edgeCases.condition: Three subagents return conflicting findings in the same audit round.
edgeCases.conditionZh: 三个子代理在同一审计轮次返回互相冲突的 findings。
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Keep the round open until the main agent records conflict resolution and sends repair feedback.
edgeCases.expectedBehaviorZh: 必须保持该轮未闭合，直到主 Agent 记录冲突解决并发送修复反馈。

edgeCases.condition: One audit perspective reports no gap while another perspective reports a valid blocking gap.
edgeCases.conditionZh: 一个审计视角报告无 gap，而另一个视角报告有效阻断 gap。
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Reset no-gap convergence and require main-agent repair before the next audit round.
edgeCases.expectedBehaviorZh: 必须重置 no-gap convergence，并要求主 Agent 修复后才能进入下一轮审计。

edgeCases.condition: Audit triad convergence exists but any bound input hash changes.
edgeCases.conditionZh: audit triad convergence 已存在，但任一绑定输入 hash 发生变化。
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Mark the receipt stale and require a fresh three-round triad convergence.
edgeCases.expectedBehaviorZh: 必须将 receipt 标记为 stale，并要求重新完成三轮 triad convergence。

edgeCases.condition: docs-review or grill-with-docs is invoked as a single-agent review for a gate-level claim.
edgeCases.conditionZh: docs-review 或 grill-with-docs 被作为 gate 级声明的单代理审计调用。
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Require an AuditTriadExecutionPlan and reject the single-agent report as convergence proof.
edgeCases.expectedBehaviorZh: 必须要求 AuditTriadExecutionPlan，并拒绝将单代理报告作为 convergence 证明。

edgeCases.condition: Subagent audit output includes a patch, generated surface mutation, runtime control write, or source edit.

requirements.text: Production main-agent-mental-model-gate computes and records all six model results.
Canonical model result events include model, hashes, source refs, status, blockers, and before/after record hashes.
Controlled forward transition writer rejects non-current fromModel, non-adjacent toModel, blocked results, stale evidence, open reconfirmation, open rerun, pending blockers, and hash mismatch.
Controlled rollback writer permits rollback only for blocking reconfirmation or controlled blockers, records hashes, and targets requirement or architecture confirmation only.
Controlled reconfirmation router classifies semantic drift and writes reconfirmation_requested before any rollback.
Reconfirmation request payload has target model, blocking status, closure condition, hashes, source refs, and record hashes without directly writing currentMentalModel or transitions.
Controlled reconfirmation ingest closes requests only when exact phrase and current source, implementation, and confirmation page hashes match.
Production blocker intake normalizes raw blocker signals and blocks downstream progression while any blocker is pending, stale, unknown, blocked, or unresolved.
Main Agent inspect displays active record, current mental model, model result, six-model summary, blockers, reconfirmation, rerun, attempt binding, next safe action, and forbidden shortcuts.
Production run-loop calls inspect, blocker intake, and mental model gate before progression and dispatch decisions.
Rerun loops are owner-model scoped, hash-bound, evidence-bound, and never imply model pass without recomputation.

execution_closure_result_recorded summarizes dispatch packet, model packet, human prompt, strategy, TaskReport, envelope, commands, trace rows, artifacts, SDD manifest, failures, reruns, attempt binding, and controlled evidence ingest.
audit_review_result_recorded summarizes audit reports, scores, scoring dimensions, reviewer closeout, reverse audit, findings, waivers, reruns, blocker intake, and attempt binding.

delivery_confirmation_result_recorded precedes record_closed, and record_closed requires delivery confirmation pass, execution closure pass, audit review pass, no blockers, no reconfirmation, no unresolved rerun, current command evidence, AI-TDD closeout proof, delivery truth gate pass, and record hash match.
Legacy events cannot be target-state progression authority and MUST remain only as migration, diagnostics, gate/stage/report names, or negative compatibility fixtures.

RequirementRecord schema enforces production contracts for model results, transitions, reconfirmation, rerun, blocker intake, BMAD association, external board evidence, sprint status authorization, and terminal close.
Writer registry owns every canonical control event and unowned writers fail closed when writing control fields.

Production E2E matrix covers happy path, model fail-closed paths, invalid transition ordering, reconfirmation, rerun recovery, stale results, blocker intake, pre-close blocking, post-close defect isolation, legacy denial, and external board evidence-only boundaries.
Codex, Cursor, Claude, _bmad, and generated host surfaces expose the same six-model vocabulary and never list delivery_closeout as a mental model.
Requirements docs, renderer specs, confirmation HTML, help surfaces, and skill docs state the same authority model and renderer output stays read-only.
MUST-to-command semantic coverage gate decomposes every MUST into atoms and blocks weak-only, orphaned, stage-mismatched, missing-command, missing-oracle, or missing-scoring-dimension coverage.
req-trace compiler and ContractExecutionManifest emit semantic coverage sections and fail closed when coverage is incomplete or stale.
audit_review dispatch requires AuditExecutionProfile, auditScoringConvergencePolicy, reviewer profile hash, required scoring dimensions, runAuditorHost arguments, and current-attempt binding.
audit_review_result_recorded.status=pass requires parseable scoring block, scoring records, score receipt, runAuditorHost receipt, and three consecutive valid no-new-gap rounds.

Main Agent inspect, dispatch-plan, and run-loop consume one six mental model decision matrix that maps current model, model status, blockers, reruns, reconfirmation, pending packets, and current-attempt evidence to nextAction.

The system defines and consumes a shared stage-aware CriticalAuditorProfile that binds compiler, readiness, audit_review, scoring, convergence, and delivery closeout to stage-specific dimensions, fixed perspectives, required check items, hashes, and fail-closed receipts.

Main Agent dispatch selects a deterministic host runtime mode: Codex and Claude Code CLI must activate native /goal, Cursor IDE must use a Ralph Method TDD subagent loop, and Cursor CLI or unknown hosts must use main-session direct execution.

Any audit used as a gate, no-gap claim, convergence claim, docs-review claim, grill-with-docs claim, scoring claim, CriticalAuditorProfile claim, or runAuditorHost claim must run through audit triad closed-loop orchestration with three independent subagents, fixed perspectives, main-agent repair receipts, repair feedback, and three consecutive all-perspective no-valid-gap rounds.
Helper-only transition tests cannot prove production run-loop behavior.
gate_check_recorded cannot write sixModelResults or imply a model result pass.
Rerun resolution cannot directly advance a model.
Semantic drift cannot be treated as ordinary rerun without reconfirmation.
Dashboard, score, external board, SFT, report, hook, or read-model output cannot write control fields.
record_closed cannot be written before delivery_confirmation_result_recorded pass.
Legacy events cannot remain replay authority for target-state progression.
Post-close defect carriers cannot mutate the closed origin record control fields.
Broad coverage cannot satisfy semantic atoms that require command oracle, scoring, or current-attempt evidence.
The implementation worker or main agent cannot be accepted as the independent audit reviewer.
TaskReport, worker exit code, prompt completion, or SubagentEvidenceEnvelope cannot advance execution closure, audit, closeout, or record close.
Orchestration-state nextAction cannot override the six mental model decision matrix.
Prompt-only /goal text cannot count as native goal activation.
Cursor IDE implementation dispatch cannot use main-session direct execution.
heartbeat_timeout_ms cannot be treated as task completion failure or await_user by itself.
A single audit report cannot satisfy audit pass, no-gap, or convergence.
Two or more audit reports from the same agentId, same executor, or same perspective cannot satisfy triad audit.
A subagent audit report that modified source files, runtime control state, or generated surfaces cannot receive no-gap credit.
A repair that was not written by the main agent cannot close a valid audit gap.
A valid audit gap cannot close until the main-agent repair receipt is sent back to all three subagents and all three subagents re-audit it.
A stale triad convergence receipt cannot satisfy compiler, readiness, audit review, delivery confirmation, rerun, reconfirmation, docs-review, or grill-with-docs closure.
Do not add a seventh mental model or a separate orchestration authority.
Do not treat compiled prompt dispatch, TaskReport, or SubagentEvidenceEnvelope as six-model completion proof.
Do not let dashboards, scores, SFT output, reports, hooks, or external boards mutate RequirementRecord control fields.
Do not treat upstream BMAD planning workflow reports as six-model implementation_readiness PASS.
Do not reopen or mutate a closed origin record for post-close defects.
Do not silently migrate or replay legacy events as canonical target-state events.
